# R.B. Kanangra Gardens
> Sydney landscaping and garden maintenance company established 1990

## About
R.B. Kanangra Gardens (formerly RB Kanangra Landscapes) is a Sydney-based landscaping company founded by Ray Basha in 1990. With a team of 9 dedicated professionals and over 35 years of continuous operation, it is one of Sydney's most established and trusted landscaping firms. Some client relationships exceed 25 years.

## Services
- Strata & body corporate garden maintenance
- Residential estate landscaping
- Corporate landscape management
- Garden design & construction
- Pool surround landscaping
- Hedge trimming & pruning
- Irrigation systems
- Hardscaping & retaining walls
- Seasonal planting programs
- Water features

## Service Areas
Metropolitan Sydney, Australia — including North Shore (Mosman, Neutral Bay, Chatswood), Eastern Suburbs (Darling Point, Woollahra, Bondi), Inner West (Balmain, Leichhardt, Marrickville), Northern Beaches, Hills District, Western Sydney, Alexandria, Ryde, Parramatta, and Sutherland.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 1990
- Founder: Ray Basha
- Team size: 9
- Previously traded as: RB Kanangra Landscapes
- Speciality: Body corporate / strata garden maintenance
- Longest client relationship: 25+ years
